tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Summer of '69 - Bryan Adams (as played on 'Unplugged')
Transcribed by Jon Nott 

Chords:
[ch]Bm[/ch]       x24432
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        x02220
G        320033 or 320003[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]        xx0232
[ch]F[/ch]        133211
[ch]Bb[/ch]       x13331
[ch]C[/ch]        x32010


[ch]D[/ch]* - progression: [ch]Dsus[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Dsus4[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Dsus[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] (arpeggiated)
[ch]A[/ch]* - progression: [ch]Asus[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus4[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]Asus[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch] (arpeggiated)


[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]* [ch]A[/ch]* [ch]D[/ch]* [ch]A[/ch]*


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*                               [ch]A[/ch]*
  I got my first real six string - bought it at the five & dime[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*                              [ch]A[/ch]*
  Played it til my fingers bled - was the summer of '69[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*                            [ch]A[/ch]*
  Me and some guys from school had a band and we tried real hard[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*                                [ch]A[/ch]*
  Jimmy quit and Jody got married - shoulda known we'd never get far[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
  Oh when I look back now - that summer seemed to last for ever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
  And if I had the choice - ya I'd always wanna be there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]*   [ch]A[/ch]*
  Those were the best days of my life[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*                         [ch]A[/ch]*
  Ain't no use complaining - when ya gotta job to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*                                       [ch]A[/ch]*
  Spent my evenings down at the drive in - and that's when I met you - ya[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  Standing on your Mamma's porch - you told me that you'd wait forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
  And when you held my hand - I knew that it was now or never[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]*   [ch]A[/ch]*                       [ch]D[/ch]*  [ch]A[/ch]*
  Those were the best days of my life - back in the summer of '69[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]
  Man we were killin' time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
  We were young and reckless - we needed to unwind[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  I guess nothing can last forever...[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]D[/ch]* [ch]A[/ch]* [ch]D[/ch]* [ch]A[/ch]*


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*
  And now the times are changin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]*
  Look at everything that's come and gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*
  Sometimes when I play my old six string[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]*
  I think about you wonder what went wrong[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Standing on your Mamma's porch - you told me it'd last forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
  And when you held my hand - I knew that it was now or never[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]* [ch]A[/ch]*                       [ch]D[/ch]*  [ch]A[/ch]*
  Those were the best days of my life -    back in the summer of '69[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]D[/ch]* [ch]A[/ch]*
